notes: state.ts uses fsPromises.readFile for async I/O, monotonic counter to disambiguate same-millisecond archives, no bare catch{} blocks. saveState uses writeFile->fsyncSync->rename ordering. index.ts guards stdio connection with isMainModule() check to avoid side-effects when imported as a library. harness.ts uses InMemoryTransport.createLinkedPair() + SDK Client — no runStart import, no per-tool if-branch. registry.ts unchanged (minimum-touch).
